name: Iso11783OPOnError
title: Iso11783OPOnError
syntax: void Iso11783OPOnError( dword ecuHandle, long error, dword vtFunction );
description: The function is called by the node layer, when the object pool detects an error.

parameters.name: error
parameters.description: Error code, see error codes 1102: Timeout during execution of a VT function, if response is not received 1103: Timeout of the status from VT, Object Pool API changes to state Wait for VT status

parameters.name: vtFunction
parameters.description: VT function which was executed when the error occurred

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
